det_check_template:
proof fn det_page_to_proc_with_first_thread(page_ptr: PagePtr, page_perm: Tracked<PagePerm4k>, owning_container: ContainerPtr, rev_ptr: SLLIndex, pcid: Pcid, ioid: Option<IOid>, first_thread: ThreadPtr, parent: Option<ProcPtr>, parent_rev_ptr: Option<SLLIndex>, uppertree_seq: Ghost<Seq<ProcPtr>>, subtree_set: Ghost<Set<ProcPtr>>, depth: usize, r1: (ProcPtr, Tracked<PointsTo<Process>>, SLLIndex), r2: (ProcPtr, Tracked<PointsTo<Process>>, SLLIndex))
    requires (page_perm@.is_init()), (page_perm@.addr() == page_ptr),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1.0 == page_ptr)
            &&& (r1.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r1.1@.addr() == r1.0)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owning_container == owning_container)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().rev_ptr == rev_ptr)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().pcid == pcid)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().ioid == ioid)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owned_threads.wf())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owned_threads@ == Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty().push(first_thread))
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owned_threads.len() == 1)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owned_threads.get_node_ref(first_thread) == r1.2)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().parent == parent)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().children.wf())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().children@ =~= Seq::empty())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().parent_rev_ptr == parent_rev_ptr)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().uppertree_seq == uppertree_seq)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().subtree_set == subtree_set)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().depth == depth)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().dmd_paging_mode == DemandPagingMode::NoDMDPG)
            &&& (r2.0 == page_ptr)
            &&& (r2.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r2.1@.addr() == r2.0)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owning_container == owning_container)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().rev_ptr == rev_ptr)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().pcid == pcid)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().ioid == ioid)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owned_threads.wf())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owned_threads@ == Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty().push(first_thread))
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owned_threads.len() == 1)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owned_threads.get_node_ref(first_thread) == r2.2)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().parent == parent)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().children.wf())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().children@ =~= Seq::empty())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().parent_rev_ptr == parent_rev_ptr)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().uppertree_seq == uppertree_seq)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().subtree_set == subtree_set)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().depth == depth)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().dmd_paging_mode == DemandPagingMode::NoDMDPG)
        }) ==> det_page_to_proc_with_first_thread_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
